ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "sick" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is sick */,
  "pregnant" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is pregnant */,
  "goitre" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a goitre */,
  "tumor" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a tumor */,
  "hypopituitary" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has hypopituitarism */,
  "psych" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has a psychological condition */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique medical record number for the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the test */,
  "TSH_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TSH was measured */,
  "TSH" REAL /* TSH test result */,
  "T3_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T3 was measured */,
  "T3" REAL /* T3 test result */,
  "TT4_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TT4 was measured */,
  "TT4" REAL /* TT4 test result */,
  "T4U_measured" INTEGER /* Whether T4U was measured */,
  "T4U" REAL /* T4U test result */,
  "FTI" REAL /* FTI test result */,
  "TBG_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TBG was measured */,
  "TBG" REAL /* TBG test result */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time when the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who performed the test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the medication */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on thyroxine */,
  "query_on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether there is a query regarding thyroxine usage */,
  "on_antithyroid_medication" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on antithyroid medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was stopped (if applicable) */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication (e.g., daily, twice a day) */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surgeries" (
  "surgery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surgery record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the surgery */,
  "thyroid_surgery" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has had thyroid surgery */,
  "I131_treatment" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has received I131 treatment */,
  "surgery_date" TEXT /* Date when the surgery was performed */,
  "surgery_time" TEXT /* Time when the surgery was performed */,
  "surgery_location" TEXT /* Location where the surgery was performed */,
  "surgeon" TEXT /* Name of the surgeon who performed the surgery */,
  "surgery_type" TEXT /* Type of surgery (e.g., thyroidectomy, lobectomy) */,
  "surgery_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the surgery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the surgery record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the surgery record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surgery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surgeries_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the diagnosis */,
  "query_hypothyroid" INTEGER /* Whether there is a query for hypothyroidism */,
  "query_hyperthyroid" INTEGER /* Whether there is a query for hyperthyroidism */,
  "class" TEXT /* Diagnostic classification (e.g., negative, positive) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the symptom */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom experienced by the patient */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_time" TEXT /* Time when the symptom was reported */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional or patient who reported the symptom */,
  "symptom_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the symptom */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the symptom record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blood_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blood test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the blood test */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the blood test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the blood test was conducted */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time when the blood test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the blood test was conducted */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare professional who performed the blood test */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the blood test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blood test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the blood test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blood_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
